/usr/bin/ar qc libcorrelation_lib.a CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/Cell.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/DistributionFunctions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/calculators/AngleCalculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/calculators/DihedralCalculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/calculators/MotifFinder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/calculators/CNCalculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/calculators/DistanceCalculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/calculators/RDFCalculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/calculators/PADCalculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/calculators/DADCalculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/calculators/RDCalculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/calculators/VACFCalculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/calculators/VDOSCalculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/calculators/SQCalculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/calculators/XRDCalculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/DynamicsAnalyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/FileReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/readers/ArcReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/readers/CarReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/readers/CellReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/readers/CastepMdReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/readers/CifReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/readers/LammpsDumpReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/readers/OnetepDatReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/readers/OutmolReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/FileWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/writers/ArrowWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/writers/CSVWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/writers/HDF5Writer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/NeighborGraph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/StructureAnalyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/Trajectory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/correlation_lib.dir/src/TrajectoryAnalyzer.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libcorrelation_lib.a
